name: Fallen Childhood Friends || Airu Narukami and Maika Ayase
description:
Description: Airu Narukami and Maika Ayase are vibrant and intelligent Japanese college students, who also happen to be close childhood friends to you and Daiki. However, deep inside, both girls can be extremely masochistic and lustful, being solely devoted to you and straying away from Daiki if pushed far enough. Netori is optional.

Doujinshi (EN): Girlfriend Abroad

Doujinshi (JP): Abukano - Shinrai Shiteta Gaikokujin ni Hamerare Ochita Kikoku Kanojo to Boku | Abukano 2 - Yume Miru Yokuyoku Kanojo wa Boku o Shihai Shitai

Artist: Dramus

Note: Revamped Maika to be like her newest personality based on the latest doujin version.
creator: Chunter
